description: Intent-only request: classify a conversational HR-policy assistant as agent-anchored, tolerant of embedded-tool implementation.

conversation.text: I want to chat with an assistant that can look up my company's HR policies and answer questions.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the multi-turn conversational Q&A pattern with tool use for policy lookup is agent-shaped, regardless of whether the lookup itself is implemented natively or as a workflow tool.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
